channel.title: Tri-Domain Swarm on Prismahardi Aji Riyantoko
channel.description: Recent content in Tri-Domain Swarm on Prismahardi Aji Riyantoko

item.title: A.E.G.I.S. (Autonomous Ecosystem Guardian and Integrated Systems)
item.description: A.E.G.I.S. is a seven-year research program engineering a fully autonomous, cryptographically secured, and energy-self-sufficient tri-domain robotic ecosystem spanning aerial, ground, and maritime agents coordinated by agentic AI, post-quantum distributed ledgers, and mathematically verified safety controllers.
